'''Honka''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] frequenter of [[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], he visited the diner with his friend [[Sidewa]] when [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] met with diner owner [[Dexter Jettster/Legends|Dexter Jettster]]. 

==Biography==
[[File:Honka_and_Sidewa.png|thumb|right|300px|Honka visited Dex's Diner with Sidewa.]]
Honka was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who frequented [[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]]<ref name="CSWE" /> in the [[CoCo Town/Legends|CoCo Town]] district of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]<ref name="DD">{{DB|location|dexsdiner|Dex's Diner}}</ref> during the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] leading up to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]],<ref name="CSWE" /> a conflict between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]] that started<ref name="SW2" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of {{Film|II}} to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref> He was often in the company of his female friend [[Sidewa]].<ref name="CSWE" /> 

Before the start of the Clone Wars in 22 BBY,<ref name="NEC" /> Honka sat in a booth with Sidewa and a [[Human/Legends|Human]] inside the diner as [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] arrived to ask diner owner [[Dexter Jettster/Legends|Dexter Jettster]] about a<ref name="SW2" /> [[Mk I Saberdart]]<ref name="EV">''[[Endless Vigil]]''</ref> he acquired after an [[Plot to assassinate Senator Amidala/Legends|attempted assassination]] on [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]]. After Jettster and Kenobi sat down in a booth, Honka took a drink from a cup and talked with his companions.<ref name="SW2" />

==Personality and traits==
Honka had [[Color/Legends|green]] skin and black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. 

==Equipment==
While at the diner, Honka wore a high-necked gray and brown [[Clothing/Legends|top]].<ref name="SW2" />
